button.base: uppercase tracking-[0.22em] font-medium px-8 py-3 transition-colors duration-300 inline-flex items-center justify-center

input.base: w-full border-b border-[#E6DACB] bg-transparent pb-2 text-[#2A2521] placeholder-[#7A7066] focus:border-[#B0904F] focus:outline-none transition-colors rounded-none font-light

layout.spacing: generous, airy, using p-8 to p-24

hero.description: Bride in elegant gown approaches a luxury boutique

fittings.description: Woman wearing white sheer lace wedding gown
Detail of bride in wedding dress

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Jost', and 'Pinyon Script' are loaded via Google Fonts.
Use light theme exclusively; do not implement dark mode.
Apply the background color #FBF8F3 (--ivory) as the default page background.
Follow exact letter-spacing constraints: uppercase eyebrow text gets 0.42em tracking, buttons get 0.22em.
Implement the 64px wide gold horizontal divider under major headings.
Use Shadcn UI components but override styling to match this organic, luxury aesthetic (remove standard rounded corners, apply elegant borders, use generous padding).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
For the admin panel, keep the luxury aesthetic but prioritize density and functionality while respecting the color palette.
